manifest.name: CRM (minimal example)
manifest.description: Minimal CRM workspace used by the framework to validate the metadata loading pipeline end-to-end.

messages.crm.lead.convert.error: Failed to convert lead. Please try again.

messages.crm.lead.convert.success: 线索已成功转化为商机。
messages.crm.opportunity.won: 恭喜！商机已标记为赢单。
messages.crm.activity.due_today: 您今天有 {count} 个活动待处理。

objects.name: crm_account
objects.label: Account
objects.description: A company that the org sells to or supports.

objects.name: crm_activity
objects.label: Activity
objects.description: A logged interaction (call, email, meeting, or task) related to a CRM record.

objects.name: crm_contact
objects.label: Contact
objects.description: A person associated with an account.

objects.name: crm_lead
objects.label: Lead
objects.description: An inbound prospect not yet qualified as an opportunity.

validations.name: lead_status_transitions
validations.label: Lead Status Transitions
validations.description: Enforces valid status progression for leads.

validations.name: lead_score_range
validations.label: Lead Score 0–100
validations.description: Lead score must be between 0 and 100.
validations.message: Lead score must be between 0 and 100.

objects.name: crm_opportunity
objects.label: Opportunity
objects.description: A potential sale tied to an account.

validations.name: discount_cap
validations.label: Discount Cap 40%
validations.message: Discount cannot exceed 40% without an approved exception.

validations.name: opp_close_date_not_past
validations.label: Close Date Must Be Future
validations.description: Prevent setting close_date to a date in the past on new records.
validations.message: Close Date must be today or a future date.

validations.name: opp_stage_transitions
validations.label: Opportunity Stage Flow
validations.description: Opportunities should progress through stages in order.

portals.label: Customer Self-Service Portal
portals.description: External portal for customers to track their account and support activities.

seo.title: Customer Portal — CRM Example
seo.description: Track your account, opportunities, and support activities.

properties.title: Welcome to the CRM
properties.subtitle: Manage your accounts, contacts and opportunities.

properties.content: This is a sample custom page. Edit it in Studio to add charts, lists, or AI components.

dashboards.name: pipeline_dashboard
dashboards.label: Pipeline Dashboard
dashboards.description: Aggregate view of the sales pipeline with period-over-period comparisons.

widgets.title: Total Pipeline ($)
widgets.description: Sum of opportunity amounts across open stages.

widgets.title: Won This Quarter
widgets.description: Revenue closed-won in the current quarter, compared to the previous quarter.

widgets.title: Avg Deal Size (YoY)
widgets.description: Average won-deal value this year vs the same window last year.

widgets.title: Pipeline Trend (12 months)
widgets.description: Opportunity count bucketed by close-month for the last year, with a sliding overlay of the prior year for compareTo.

widgets.title: Opportunities by Stage
widgets.description: Count grouped by stage with previous-quarter overlay (compareTo).

widgets.title: Open Pipeline by Stage ($)
widgets.description: Open-pipeline revenue split by pipeline stage. Pie/donut/funnel ignore `compareTo`.

reports.name: crm_sales_by_stage
reports.label: Sales by Stage
reports.description: Total opportunity amount grouped by sales stage.

themes.name: crm_light
themes.label: CRM Light
themes.description: Default CRM theme — professional blue, light mode.

workflows.name: crm_high_value_deal_alert
workflows.description: Notify sales managers when a deal larger than $100k is created or updated.

workflows.name: crm_stale_opportunity_alert
workflows.description: Flags open opportunities that have not been updated in 30 days and notifies the sales rep.

actions.name: create_followup_task
actions.subject: Follow up on stale opportunity: {record.name}
actions.description: This opportunity has not been updated in 30+ days. Please review and update.

approvals.name: crm_discount_approval
approvals.label: Opportunity Discount Approval
approvals.description: Two-step approval for opportunities with significant discounts.

steps.name: manager_review
steps.label: Manager Review
steps.description: First-line sales manager reviews the discount.

steps.name: finance_review
steps.label: Finance Review
steps.description: Finance signs off if discount exceeds 30%.

flows.name: opportunity_won_notification
flows.label: Notify on Opportunity Won
flows.description: Sends a celebration email when an opportunity is closed-won.

flows.name: lead_qualification_conversion
flows.label: Lead Qualification & Conversion
flows.description: Qualifies an inbound lead through scoring and enrichment, then converts it to an Opportunity via parallel processing, a timed wait, and optional manager escalation.

data.notes: Auto-disqualified: Lead score {lead_score}/100 below threshold. Enrichment source: {enrichment_data.company_size}.

inputs.reason: No rep follow-up within 24 h of lead conversion (score: {lead_score})

flows.name: renewal_reminder_flow
flows.label: Daily Renewal Opportunity Creator
flows.description: Runs daily, finds closed-won opportunities with a close date ~12 months ago that have no renewal, and creates a renewal opportunity for each.

config.script: console.info('Renewal run complete — created', renewals_created, 'renewal opportunities.');

flows.name: crm_convert_lead_wizard
flows.label: Convert Lead to Opportunity
flows.description: Screen flow wizard that converts a qualified CRM lead into an Opportunity, marks the lead as converted, and links the two records.

config.message: This lead has already been converted to an opportunity.

fields.name: opp_name
fields.label: Opportunity Name
fields.helpText: Descriptive name for the new opportunity

fields.name: opp_account
fields.label: Account
fields.helpText: The account this opportunity belongs to

config.message:
Create opportunity "{opp_name}" for lead "{lead_record.name}"?

Stage: {opp_stage} · Amount: ${opp_amount} · Close: {opp_close_date}
✅ Lead converted! Opportunity "{opp_name}" has been created.

jobs.name: crm_lead_scoring
jobs.label: Nightly Lead Score Refresh
jobs.description: Recalculates lead_score for all open leads using engagement signals.

jobs.name: crm_pipeline_report
jobs.label: Weekly Pipeline Report
jobs.description: Generates and emails weekly pipeline summary to sales managers.

jobs.name: crm_renewal_sweep
jobs.label: Daily Renewal Reminder Sweep
jobs.description: Scans contracts expiring within 30 days and enqueues reminder flows.

roles.name: sales_manager
roles.label: Sales Manager
roles.description: Manages a team of sales reps.

roles.name: finance_approver
roles.label: Finance Approver
roles.description: Finance team member authorised to approve discounts above 30%.

sharingRules.name: share_high_value_opps_with_managers
sharingRules.label: High-Value Deals → Sales Managers
sharingRules.description: Automatically share opportunities over $100,000 with all Sales Managers.

sharingRules.name: share_rep_leads_with_manager
sharingRules.label: Rep's Leads → Manager (read-only)
sharingRules.description: Share each rep's leads with the Sales Manager role for coaching visibility.

sharingRules.name: share_won_deal_activities
sharingRules.label: Won-Deal Activities → All Sales
sharingRules.description: Share activities attached to closed-won opportunities across the sales team.

apis.name: crm_pipeline_summary
apis.description: Returns opportunity count and total value grouped by stage.

apis.name: crm_lead_convert
apis.summary: Convert a lead to an opportunity

webhooks.name: crm_opportunity_changed
webhooks.label: Opportunity Created / Updated
webhooks.description: Fires on every opportunity create/update for downstream sync.

webhooks.name: crm_deal_won_slack
webhooks.label: Deal Won → Slack
webhooks.description: Posts to #wins Slack channel when stage=closed_won.

agents.name: crm_sales_assistant
agents.label: Sales Assistant
agents.role: You are a helpful sales operations assistant for a CRM system.
agents.instructions: Help sales reps find contacts, update opportunities, and summarise their pipeline. Always be concise and ask before making destructive changes.

skills.name: crm_deal_management
skills.label: Deal Management
skills.description: Tools and prompts for working with sales opportunities.

analyticsCubes.name: crm_pipeline
analyticsCubes.title: CRM Pipeline
analyticsCubes.description: Revenue and deal-count analytics across the sales pipeline.

win_rate.name: win_rate
win_rate.label: Win Rate (%)
win_rate.sql: SUM(CASE WHEN stage = 'closed_won' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)

analyticsCubes.name: crm_lead_funnel
analyticsCubes.title: CRM Lead Funnel
analyticsCubes.description: Lead volume and conversion rate analytics.

connectors.name: hubspot_crm
connectors.label: HubSpot CRM
connectors.description: Bi-directional sync of contacts, companies, and deals with HubSpot.

actions.label: Create Contact
actions.description: Create a new contact in HubSpot

actions.label: Update Deal
actions.description: Update an existing deal in HubSpot

triggers.label: Contact Created
triggers.description: Fires when a contact is created in HubSpot

triggers.label: Deal Stage Changed
triggers.description: Polls every 5 minutes for deal stage changes

connectors.name: slack_notifications
connectors.label: Slack
connectors.description: Post deal-win and alert notifications to Slack channels.

actions.label: Post Message
actions.description: Post a message to a Slack channel

records.title: Founder
records.notes: Company too small; no budget this year.
